description: Interactive quiz or personality test posts that ask followers to make a choice or guess, encouraging participation and tagged responses through mentions and comments.
structural_recipe: Post a binary or multiple-choice question with visual elements (logos, characters, options). Use casual Arabic phrasing with emojis (👀✨🔥😎). Include a call-to-action encouraging comments, mentions of friends, or tagging of accounts. Bridge Arabic and English for wider reach. Frame as a 'test' or challenge to community knowledge.
why_it_works: Leverages Saudi social culture of peer validation and friendly competition. Mentioning friends creates network effects and increases post distribution. The casual tone combined with brand loyalty testing (knowing logos/history) builds community identity and nostalgia, particularly effective in F&B where brand recognition and repeat patronage are key.
transplantation_caveats: Requires established brand recognition to work effectively; new or unknown brands may see lower participation
Quiz difficulty must be calibrated to target audience knowledge level to avoid frustration
Mention-based CTAs can trigger Instagram spam filters if overused; monitor performance
Cultural references or brand history may not translate outside Saudi market
